title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.160 - Expiration of term, resignation or removal — disposition of moneys
text:
52.160.  Expiration of term, resignation or removal — disposition of moneys. — If any collector resigns, dies or is removed from office for any cause, he, or his legal representatives, shall pay over immediately all moneys which are in his or their hands, due the state, to his successor in office and deliver the tax books to the county clerk.
(RSMo 1939 § 11073, A.L. 1959 S.B. 62) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9902; 1919 § 12894; 1909 § 11448
